evidence_quotes.quote: It is necessary to prohibit the sale of digital products as services.
It must also be prohibited to build products that do not function without the supplier’s service.
Moreover, digital products should not be tied to an anbiter.

paragraphs.text: This is a good idea. As an appsentiwckler, however, I have to note that this issue is even more complex than one thinks. Teschnich is being withheld so much in the EU because companies can do what you want digitally. It is necessary to prohibit the sale of digital products as services. It must also be prohibited to build products that do not function without the supplier’s service. Every bunker should be allowed to add its own service to the device. Moreover, digital products should not be tied to an anbiter. This has already caused significant financial damage to a supplier on several occasions. For safety reasons, a user should be allowed to deposit a single certificate authority with keys in the boat loader of each device. This will allow the installation of alternative operating systems. Such a solution allows the user to resolve any problems with the device himself. Avoiding forced updates and a right to repair and use older digital products opens up a new market for services.
